# SoleTraderTax.com.au

> Free tools for Australian contractors and sole traders.

## Tools
- [Contractor Tax Calculator](https://soletradertax.com.au/): Calculate charge-out rate, take-home pay, GST obligations and PAYG instalments for 2025-26.
- [GST Calculator](https://soletradertax.com.au/tools/gst-calculator): Add or remove 10% GST from any amount instantly.

## Blog
- [All articles](https://soletradertax.com.au/blog): Tax guides, GST, super, PAYG and invoicing tips for Australian sole traders and ABN contractors.

## Notes
- General guidance only, not financial or tax advice.
- Based on 2025-26 ATO rates.
